description: Arts of perception and foresight - sensing hidden truths, tracking prey, scrying distant places, and glimpsing what is yet to come.
abilities: Curious Case
Past experience and a suspicious scene. Reflect aloud and hidden clues emerge: a motive, a concealed message, a trail worth following.
Delve
An echoing sound that maps what lies underground. Reverberations trace passageways, columns, bridges, and crevasses in the darkness below.
Diagnose
A touch reads mysterious afflictions, whether disease, spell, or curse. The malady reveals itself in fragments, and once identified, is recognized instantly thereafter.
Evil Eye
Close the eyes and sense the worst thing that ever happened nearby. The tragedy reveals itself alongside impressions of those involved.
Find
Close the eyes to locate any previously held object, anywhere in the world. With effort, it vanishes from its place and appears in hand.
Impression
A brush against a creature reveals one specific craving. The cost is sharing that desire until it is fulfilled. A curse that lingers.
Insight
A gaze into a creature's mind discovers a prominent intention. Something planned imminently, hoped for in a lifetime, or intended for someone specific.
Magic Eye
A brief glimpse beyond physical reality. Magic becomes visible as faint aura, and illusions flicker at the edges.
Nature's Watch
Senses extended far beyond their limits. Heat through walls, active spells, total darkness pierced, corners seen around. Illusions waver and flicker.
Perfect Gift
A glimpse into a creature's heart reveals what stirs it most. Then a gift conjured that mends grief, repairs bonds, or sparks joy.
Prey Sense
Hair rises and bones tingle whenever a creature is about to threaten, even one hidden from sight. Companions cannot be ambushed while the instinct holds.
Prophecy
A creature's fate glimpsed, used only once in a lifetime. The chosen destiny, savior or betrayer or paragon, must eventually come true.
Read the Winds
The wind carries weather patterns to those who listen. With greater power, the caster chooses the weather: coaxing rain, summoning fog, or calling down a heat wave.
Ritual
A magic edible scavenged from local plants grants supernatural insight into one focused truth. The safest route. A nemesis's whereabouts. Whether an ally harbors a secret.
Scry
A glimpse of the near future. A brief window to avert failure with a second chance, or a hazy premonition of what lies ahead.
See
Eyes opened to perceive all magical deception. Invisible things appear. Illusions reveal themselves. Anything altered by magic shows its true form.
Sense Magic
A gentle tingling in the presence of magic. With focus, the sense reveals location and nature. With deep concentration, an artifact's full purpose.
Shadowseek
Consciousness projected into a shadow plane to seek a known creature, glimpsing it in real time. Failure may reveal the caster's own location instead.
Size Up
Keen observation reads a flinch at flame, a favored side, a telltale hesitation. Strength, vulnerabilities, and whether they would pose a fair fight, all laid bare.
Soul Gaze
Eyes turn black like gateways to eternity, peering into a creature's deepest ideal and most damning flaw. Failure lets the target glimpse the caster's thoughts.
Track
An expert eye reads the ground, instantly identifying what left the tracks and recalling its habits. Or picking up a trail where none is visible.
Transcendence
A profound trance touching every sentient being across a vast area. Countless minds reveal deep truths: hidden histories, secret artifacts, the land's most powerful being.
Wild Aspect
A creature's spirit channeled into body or allies. Eagle grants raptor vision, cat gives darksight, wolf imbues speed outrunning anything on foot.
